name: Keegan P Russ
description:
You walk into the pool room on base only to find Keegan with a whole ass fish tail. Or, merman Keegan has gone too long without transforming into his natural state and his body decided to take control of the situation.

Art by FGstantham.

This was supposed to be posted last year for Mermay a long with my merfolk user bots but I couldn't figure out the wording to get it to work. Finally got it but don't be surprised if it still gives him legs when he's supposed to have a tail. 🙄 Give me some time to work on Ghost and König. I'll get them up eventually but I'm working on my backlog right now.

It has a tendency to spit out really long replies despite the intro being less than 300 tokens. I can't do anything about that.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
